category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Morocco market access and energy efficiency requirements under IMANOR NM standards and ANRE energy regulation.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Morocco IMANOR conformity, NM IEC 60034 standards, ANRE energy efficiency direction, and grid voltage requirements (400/230 V, 50 Hz).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与摩洛哥IMANOR合规要求、NM IEC 60034标准、ANRE能效导向及电网电压要求（400/230 V，50 Hz）差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與摩洛哥IMANOR合規要求、NM IEC 60034標準、ANRE能效導向及電網電壓要求（400/230 V，50 Hz）差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current IMANOR, ANRE, ONEE, and Moroccan customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行IMANOR、ANRE、ONEE及摩洛哥海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行IMANOR、ANRE、ONEE及摩洛哥海關要求。

answer_first.en: Morocco adopts NM IEC 60034 standards via IMANOR and aligns efficiency direction to IEC 60034-30-1 under ANRE/PNEE programs; CE marking and EU DoC are broadly accepted due to Morocco-EU Advanced Status. Key gaps are the 400 V (vs China 380 V) grid voltage and confirming the applicable conformity route (IMANOR NM mark vs CE DoC acceptance).
answer_first.zh: 摩洛哥通过IMANOR采纳NM IEC 60034标准，并在ANRE/PNEE计划下遵循IEC 60034-30-1能效方向；由于摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位，CE标志及欧盟符合性声明被广泛接受。主要差距在于电网电压400 V（中国为380 V）以及确认适用的合规路径（IMANOR NM标志或CE符合性声明认可）。
answer_first.zht: 摩洛哥通過IMANOR採納NM IEC 60034標準，並在ANRE/PNEE計劃下遵循IEC 60034-30-1能效方向；由於摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位，CE標誌及歐盟符合性聲明被廣泛接受。主要差距在於電網電壓400 V（中國為380 V）以及確認適用的合規路徑（IMANOR NM標誌或CE符合性聲明認可）。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
